## Latest status banner (mirrored from website footer)

**Latest status (2026-04-29)** — for hand-curated pages, this card is the canonical reference for the most recent week's progress and supersedes any text dated earlier.

**Pillar 4 sub-task 2 (flat-Cartan ground-state forcing)** is **PROVED CONDITIONAL** on the two named microscopic lemmas A (positive curvature stiffness) and B (relative no-negative-offset $\Delta\Gamma_{\rm rest}\geq -\epsilon\,\mathcal F_{\rm top}$, $\epsilon<1$). The mathematical skeleton (Hodge bound on $\mathbb{CP}^2$ + Yang–Mills self-duality + Chern–Weil + composition) is **PROVED UNCONDITIONAL** in Math222. Lemma A is at PROVED CONDITIONAL with explicit U(1)$_\chi$ charge table and SU(5) non-trivial action (Math221-AddB/AddC). Lemma B is at STRONG DRAFT with marginal numerical safety margin (Math220-AddA/AddB); strict constant-bound theorem closure pending Task #169.

**Pillar 4 sub-task 3 (SO(10) → SU(5)×U(1)$_\chi$ → G$_{\rm SM}$ breaking pattern)** is **PROVED CONDITIONAL** on Pillar 6 Higgs mechanism (Math229).

**GAP-1 boson-loop subdominance** independently re-audited and **PROVED CONDITIONAL (weak)** retained ($R_{\rm boson/fermion}\approx 0.12$, Math163+Math227). **GAP-2** TECT-specific Berry-phase signature is **FALSIFIED** (Math226 negative result; $\pi_1(M_{\rm BCC})=\{e\}$, all loops contractible); the BRST Faddeev–Popov framework itself is preserved.

**Methodology hardening (post-8 audit-rollbacks in 3 days)**: CLAUDE.md §6.3.4 mandates a quantitative sanity check in every Math note; §6.3.5 (a)/(b)/(c) requires self-adversarial review with $\geq 3$ concrete objections, the estimate-vs-theorem distinction for $\epsilon$-type inequalities, and a final consolidation note upon full closure; §6.3.6 makes universal numerical-run recording (`Codes/pde/record_run.py` + `RESULT.md` skeleton + `run_diagnostics.json`) binding for all 30+ TECT drivers.

**Numerical-record infrastructure**: `Codes/pde/record_run.py` v1.0 (driver-agnostic 3-call API) + `Codes/pde/RESULT_TEMPLATE.md` (10-section publication-grade standard) + `Docs/policy/NUMERICAL_RUN_RECORDING.md` (Tier-1/2/3 migration deadlines). The 53.9 h `math82H_phase2_mu2_-0.7_N32_v266d` deep-quench run (NO_CONVERGENCE, $\|\nabla\|/\sqrt{\mathrm{dof}} = 2.45\times 10^{-8}$, factor 2.45 above gate) is the canonical case-study for terminal-log-loss recovery via retroactive `RESULT.md` populate; warm-restart Plan A queued.

**Honest scope (non-promoted)**: TECT is **NOT** an unconditional TOE. flat-Cartan forcing is conditionally proved at the energy-minimisation level. $S_1$ stage-1 is PARTIAL with Pillar 4 (sub-task 2/3 conditional), Pillar 6 (Higgs scalar potential outstanding, Task #170), Pillar 10 (OPEN-NEGATIVE REFINED) as the remaining critical-path items. Cosmological realisation (E$_3'$, Math218-AddA) is at CONDITIONAL CONJECTURE pending Mechanism I (Kibble–Zurek suppressed defect production) or Mechanism II (catalysed annihilation).

**Recommended next dispatcher actions**: Task #169 (Math220-AddB strict $\kappa_{\min} > C_m + C_d$ constant-bound theorem) and Task #170 (Pillar 6 Higgs scalar potential derivation). When both close at PROVED CONDITIONAL with audit verification, a CLAUDE.md §6.3.5(c) Final Consolidation note ("canonical milestone") will record the entire flat-Cartan forcing proof start-to-finish.
